description_long: This house features a steeply pitched, reddish-brown tiled gable roof with a prominent overhang, evoking a traditional European or Tudor style. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, accented by dark wooden beams arranged in a decorative half-timbered pattern. The front facade includes a central entryway with a small stone step, flanked by two windows with wooden shutters and a decorative wooden lintel above the door. The side extension of the house has a similar roof and window treatment, with a small arched window and additional timber detailing. The rear of the house is simpler, with minimal window openings and a plain wall surface. The overall structure suggests a cozy, single-family dwelling with rustic charm and historical architectural influences.
description: A quaint, beige house with a steep red-tiled gable roof, half-timbered accents, and a central entryway flanked by shuttered windows. The design is reminiscent of traditional European or Tudor cottages.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, two shuttered windows, and decorative half-timbered facade beneath a steep tiled roof.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the entry step, two lantern-style windows, and the pronounced gable roof with timber accents.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the extension with an arched window, additional timber details, and the continuation of the tiled roof.
description_view_3: Rear view with a plain beige wall, minimal window openings, and the back slope of the gable roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with a small stone step, flanked by shuttered windows and decorative timber framing.
